title: Siena Saints vs. Duke Blue Devils Live Score, Stats and Updates, March 19, 2026 Gametracker
body:
In a stunning display of resilience, 16th-seeded Siena Saints sent shockwaves through the NCAA Tournament on Thursday, giving top-ranked Duke Blue Devils all they could handle in a highly anticipated matchup. The Saints' determination and tenacious defense kept the Blue Devils at bay for most of the game, leaving fans and analysts alike wondering if the No. 1 seed's reign was finally coming to an end.

Despite being the heavily favored team, the Blue Devils struggled to find their rhythm, committing a staggering number of turnovers and allowing Siena to capitalize on every mistake. Meanwhile, the Saints' aggressive approach paid dividends, as they sank crucial shots and capitalized on Duke's lapses to stay within striking distance. As the game wore on, it became increasingly clear that the Saints were not going to go quietly into the night, and their spirited performance threatened to upset the established order of the tournament.

One of the key factors contributing to Siena's success was their ability to contain Duke's high-powered offense. The Blue Devils entered the game boasting one of the most potent attacks in the country, but the Saints' defenders were up to the challenge, holding them to well below their season average. By limiting Duke's scoring opportunities, Siena was able to stay afloat despite being outmanned and outgunned. This achievement is a testament to the Saints' coaching staff and players, who have been working tirelessly to develop a defensive strategy that can counter even the most potent opponents.

In contrast, Duke's struggles on the other end of the court were a stark reminder that even the best teams can have off nights. Despite having a bevy of talented players at his disposal, the Blue Devils' coach was unable to get his team to gel, and the result was a lackluster performance that left many scratching their heads. As the game drew to a close, it became clear that Duke would need to regroup and refocus if they were to make a deep run in the tournament.

While Siena's effort on Thursday was undoubtedly commendable, it remains to be seen whether the Saints can sustain this level of performance against even tougher opponents. As they move forward in the tournament, they will face increasingly formidable foes, and it remains to be seen whether they have what it takes to make a lasting impression. For now, however, the Saints can take pride in having pushed the mighty Blue Devils to the limit, and their fans can look forward to a thrilling ride as they continue their Cinderella story.

As the NCAA Tournament continues to unfold, one thing is certain: the path to the championship will be fraught with challenges and surprises. With Siena's upset bid setting the stage for a thrilling matchup, it will be fascinating to see how the Blue Devils respond to this setback and how the Saints can build on their momentum. One thing is clear, however: the world of college basketball is full of surprises, and only time will tell which team will emerge victorious in the end.
